"user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41161", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-208", "name": "Observable Timing Discrepancy"}], "description": "### Summary The `/api/auth/login` endpoint contains a logic flaw that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to enumerate valid usernames by measuring the application's response time. ### Details The logic flaw can be located at the below point in source: https://github.com/Sync-in/server/blob/7868bb2b3025f92e6c38087456304758713971b2/backend/src/applications/users/services/users-queries.service.ts#L91-L95 Endpoints used for authentication should respond to the user with a consistent cadence, preventing remote actors from deriving sensitive information about an application based on backend behavior. In the case of authentication endpoints, this timing discrepancy is often caused by short-circuiting due to the lack of a matched user to compare against - as is the case with Sync-in. ### Validation TickTock Enum (Burp Suite Extension) was utilized to validate this finding. Authentication attempts with a valid username see a response from the application at around 350-400ms on average, while invalid usernames are returned at only 95-100ms on average. ### Impact An unauthenticated remote attacker can enumerate valid usernames. This significantly weakens the application's security posture by facilitating targeted brute-force attacks, stuffing, social engineering, and a suite of other more targeted attacks.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00333, "percentile": 0.24917}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-43fj-qp3h-hrh5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-15T18:57:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-43fj-qp3h-hrh5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-43fj-qp3h-hrh5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41161"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-08T14:16:33Z", "published_at": "2026-04-15T18:57:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Sync-in/server/security/advisories/GHSA-43fj-qp3h-hrh5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41161", "https://github.com/Sync-in/server/releases/tag/v2.2.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-43fj-qp3h-hrh5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Sync-in/server/security-advisories/GHSA-43fj-qp3h-hrh5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Sync-in/server", "summary": "Sync-in Server has Username Enumeration via Timing Attack", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T13:31:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-43fj-qp3h-hrh5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@sync-in/server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Sync-in Server has Username Enumeration via Timing Attack
